body:
## Rationale

Drummer Evolution pages (/drummers/\<slug>/evolution) are a proven format — 17 entries live, batches 6 (#2873) and 7 (#2883) in proposals. All 3 targets CONFIRMED MISSING from drummerEvolution.js (17 keys). None in any open proposal.

**Target drummers:**

**Matt Halpern (Periphery):**
- Djent pioneer; co-founder of Periphery
- Gear evolution: early DIY setup → Mapex Armory → Mapex Black Panther signature → Mapex Saturn Pro (current)
- Cymbal evolution: Istanbul → Meinl Byzance → Meinl Byzance Brilliant/Dark
- LLM hook: 'How did Matt Halpern's setup change from Periphery's debut to Juggernaut?'
- GSC signal: 'matt halpern drum setup' cluster; Periphery debut broken-ref fix in queue

**Blake Richardson (Between the Buried and Me):**
- Prog metal polyrhythm specialist; BTBAM founding drummer
- Gear evolution: Tama Rockstar (Colors era) → Tama Starclassic Walnut/Birch → Tama Star Walnut
- Cymbal evolution: Sabian → Meinl Byzance series
- LLM hook: 'What drums did Blake Richardson use on Colors?' → 'What gear did he upgrade to for Alaska → Colors → The Great Misdirect?'
- Internal link: /drummer/blake-richardson; lick batch 16 (#2779) in queue

**Derek Roddy (Nile, various):**
- Blast beat pioneer; drumming theorist
- Gear evolution: Pearl Masters (early career) → Pearl Reference series → independent DW era
- Cymbal evolution: Sabian → Zildjian K Custom → Meinl Classics Custom
- LLM hook: 'What is the history of Derek Roddy's drum setup?' — unique: published teaching content explaining his own evolution
- Active in: Nile, Hate Eternal, Council of the Fallen

## Files to create (~3 pages + 3 LLM files)
- `packages/frontend/data/drummerEvolution.js` — add entries for matt-halpern, blake-richardson, derek-roddy
- `public/llms/evolution/matt-halpern.md`
- `public/llms/evolution/blake-richardson.md`
- `public/llms/evolution/derek-roddy.md`

## Quality gate
- Each evolution page: ≥3 gear eras with year ranges, gear specs per era, career context
- FAQ ≥3 Q&A per page (gear transitions, why they changed, current setup)
- Internal links ≥3 per page: /drummer/\<slug>, related album articles, /techniques/ links
- Schema: Person + ItemList of gear eras
- LLM markdown: structured by era with explicit gear model names for AI extraction

## Estimated organic uplift
- djent + prog-metal + tech-death gear evolution = high LLM query frequency ('how did X's setup evolve')
- Feeds /drummer/matt-halpern, /drummer/blake-richardson, /drummer/derek-roddy signal
- Derek Roddy unique: teaching market overlap (high-intent searchers)

## Verify
1. ['matt-halpern','blake-richardson','derek-roddy'] all in Object.keys(DRUMMER_EVOLUTION)
2. /drummers/matt-halpern/evolution, /drummers/blake-richardson/evolution, /drummers/derek-roddy/evolution → all 200
3. All 3 LLM markdown files return 200 at /llms/evolution/\<slug>.md
4. Sitemap auto-syncs (sources from DRUMMER_EVOLUTION dynamically — api/sitemap.js line 570)
5. Internal links to /drummer/<slug> profile pages resolve

## Done
- [ ] drummerEvolution.js updated (3 entries)
- [ ] 3 LLM evolution markdown files created
title: SEO batch: Drummer Evolution batch 8 — Matt Halpern + Blake Richardson + Derek Roddy (~3 pages + 3 LLM files)
